city_report.transport: By bus In front of the main gate of Valletta is the main bus station for the entire island, and bus lines covering the island in a grid, most of them spread out from here and return to here.

hotel.name: Grand Harbour Hotel
hotel.price: standard double rooms from €100 (from €80 in low season), including breakfast

attraction.name: Upper Barrakka
attraction.description: Public gardens with panoramic views of the harbor.

attraction.name: St. John's Cathedral
attraction.description: Highly decorated Baroque church with Caravaggio art.

attraction.name: Grand Harbour
attraction.description: The historic natural harbor of Malta.

attraction.name: Fort St. Elmo
attraction.description: Star-shaped fort and National War Museum.

attraction.name: Grandmaster's Palace
attraction.description: The historic center of government in Malta.

attraction.name: Republic Street
attraction.description: The main shopping and commercial street.

attraction.name: National Archaeology
attraction.description: Museum housing prehistoric artifacts from the islands.

attraction.name: Casa Rocca Piccola
attraction.description: 16th-century palace belonging to a noble family.

attraction.name: Teatru Manoel
attraction.description: One of the oldest working theaters in Europe.

attraction.name: Hastings Gardens
attraction.description: Quiet gardens on top of the St. John's Bastion.

city_report.description: Fortezza barocca nel cuore del Mediterraneo, La Valletta è un museo a cielo aperto dalla sicurezza impeccabile. Le sue dimensioni ridotte nascondono un'energia culturale vibrante e un clima mite tutto l'anno.
city_report.wiki_intro: Valletta or Il-Belt is the capital of Malta. Historically built as harbour city to first capital, Valletta preserves much of its 16th-century architectural heritage built under the Hospitallers. Valletta was one of the earliest sites inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List. Referred to colloquially as Il-Belt ("The City") in Maltese, it takes its name from its founder, Grandmaster Jean...
